reason: Cannot write behavioral fail_to_pass tests: (1) bug is in Zig code requiring full build toolchain (Zig+CMake+WebKit) to compile and run, (2) the test that would catch the bug (130+ component patterns) is added by the gold patch - it does not exist in base code so cannot be used as fail_to_pass test, (3) bun test passes all 169 tests on base code showing existing tests don't catch this bug. The only viable detection mechanism is structural tests (grep-based) which the judge flagged. Oracle works: nop=0, gold=1. test.sh was modified to install fast-glob dependency for bun test, but this doesn't enable behavioral fail_to_pass testing.
